Class PlaylistController

java.lang.Object
com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.controller.PlaylistController
@Component public class PlaylistController extends Object
Top-level controller for the Playlist page. Owns the only mutable view-state: selectedPlaylist and displayMode. Delegates all node construction to PlaylistViewBuilder. Delegates all dialogs to PlaylistDialogHandler (via PlaylistViewBuilder).
